'''goragaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:okkard|okkard]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-r-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okkard|okkard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| goragaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:goragithi|goragithi]] || [[word:goragiji|goragiji]] || [[word:goragishi|goragishi]] || [[word:goragiki|goragiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:goraguthuthu|goraguthuthu]] || [[word:goragujuju|goragujuju]] || [[word:goragushushu|goragushushu]] || [[word:goragukuku|goragukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:goraguthu|goraguthu]] || [[word:goraguju|goraguju]] || [[word:goragushu|goragushu]] || [[word:goraguku|goraguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:goragufthuf|goragufthuf]] || [[word:goragufjuf|goragufjuf]] || [[word:goragufshuf|goragufshuf]] || [[word:goragufkuf|goragufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:goragethe|goragethe]] || [[word:gorageje|gorageje]] || [[word:gorageshe|gorageshe]] || [[word:gorageke|gorageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:goragothotho|goragothotho]] || [[word:goragojojo|goragojojo]] || [[word:goragoshosho|goragoshosho]] || [[word:goragokoko|goragokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:goragotho|goragotho]] || [[word:goragojo|goragojo]] || [[word:goragosho|goragosho]] || [[word:goragoko|goragoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:goragofthof|goragofthof]] || [[word:goragofjof|goragofjof]] || [[word:goragofshof|goragofshof]] || [[word:goragofkof|goragofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:goragÃŸfthÃŸf|goragÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:goragÃŸfjÃŸf|goragÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:goragÃŸfshÃŸf|goragÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:goragÃŸfkÃŸf|goragÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:goragÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|goragÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:goragÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|goragÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:goragÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|goragÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:goragÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|goragÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:goragÃŸfthÃŸf|goragÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:goragÃŸfjÃŸf|goragÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:goragÃŸfshÃŸf|goragÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:goragÃŸfkÃŸf|goragÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:goragÃŸfthÃŸf|goragÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:goragÃŸfjÃŸf|goragÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:goragÃŸfshÃŸf|goragÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:goragÃŸfkÃŸf|goragÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:goragÃḊthÃḊ|goragÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:goragÃḊjÃḊ|goragÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:goragÃḊshÃḊ|goragÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:goragÃḊkÃḊ|goragÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:goragathatha|goragathatha]] || [[word:goragajaja|goragajaja]] || [[word:goragashasha|goragashasha]] || [[word:goragakaka|goragakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:goragatha|goragatha]] || [[word:goragaja|goragaja]] || [[word:goragasha|goragasha]] || [[word:goragaka|goragaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:goragafthaf|goragafthaf]] || [[word:goragafjaf|goragafjaf]] || [[word:goragafshaf|goragafshaf]] || [[word:goragafkaf|goragafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:goragasha|goragasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:goragshÃḋsha|goragshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goragrosha|goragrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goragmusha|goragmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:goragyasha|goragyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogoragnkshÃḋsha|gogoragnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogoragnkrosha|gogoragnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogoragnkmusha|gogoragnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogoragnkyasha|gogoragnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:goraragasha|goraragasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:goraragshÃḋsha|goraragshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goraragrosha|goraragrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goraragmusha|goraragmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:goraragyasha|goraragyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogoraragnkshÃḋsha|gogoraragnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogoraragnkrosha|gogoraragnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogoraragnkmusha|gogoraragnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogoraragnkyasha|gogoraragnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gerÃḊgasha|gerÃḊgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gerÃḊgshÃḋsha|gerÃḊgshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gerÃḊgrosha|gerÃḊgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gerÃḊgmusha|gerÃḊgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gerÃḊgyasha|gerÃḊgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogerÃḊgnkshÃḋsha|gogerÃḊgnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogerÃḊgnkrosha|gogerÃḊgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogerÃḊgnkmusha|gogerÃḊgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogerÃḊgnkyasha|gogerÃḊgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gorfagasha|gorfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gorfagshÃḋsha|gorfagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorfagrosha|gorfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gorfagmusha|gorfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gorfagyasha|gorfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogorfagnkshÃḋsha|gogorfagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogorfagnkrosha|gogorfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogorfagnkmusha|gogorfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogorfagnkyasha|gogorfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|59e8839}}
